rules.title: GCS bucket without encryption
rules.description: GCS bucket is not using customer-managed encryption keys

rules.title: GCS bucket publicly accessible
rules.remediation: Remove allUsers and allAuthenticatedUsers IAM bindings

rules.title: GCS bucket without versioning
rules.description: GCS bucket does not have versioning enabled
rules.remediation: Add versioning block with enabled = true

rules.title: GCS bucket without logging
rules.description: GCS bucket does not have access logging enabled

rules.title: Firewall allows unrestricted SSH
rules.remediation: Restrict SSH access to specific IP ranges or use IAP

rules.title: Firewall allows unrestricted RDP
rules.remediation: Restrict RDP access to specific IP ranges or use IAP

rules.title: Cloud SQL without SSL enforcement
rules.description: Cloud SQL instance does not require SSL connections

rules.title: Cloud SQL publicly accessible
rules.description: Cloud SQL instance has public IP enabled
rules.remediation: Set ipv4_enabled = false and use private IP

rules.title: Cloud SQL without backup
rules.description: Cloud SQL instance does not have automated backups enabled

rules.title: GKE cluster without network policy
rules.description: GKE cluster does not have network policy enabled
rules.remediation: Add network_policy block with enabled = true

rules.title: GKE cluster with legacy auth
rules.description: GKE cluster has legacy ABAC authorization enabled

rules.title: GKE node without shielded instance
rules.description: GKE nodes do not have shielded instance features enabled
rules.remediation: Add shielded_instance_config with enable_secure_boot and enable_integrity_monitoring

rules.title: Compute instance with public IP
rules.description: Compute instance has an external IP address assigned
rules.remediation: Remove access_config block to use only internal IP

rules.title: Compute disk without encryption
rules.description: Compute disk is not using customer-managed encryption keys

rules.title: VPC without flow logs
rules.description: VPC subnet does not have flow logs enabled
rules.remediation: Add log_config block to enable VPC flow logs

rules.title: Hardcoded GCP credentials
rules.description: GCP service account key is hardcoded in the configuration
rules.remediation: Use workload identity, environment variables, or Secret Manager

rules.title: Pub/Sub topic without encryption
rules.description: Pub/Sub topic is not encrypted with CMEK
rules.remediation: Add kms_key_name to encrypt Pub/Sub messages with CMEK
